name: DMC TELECOM
notes:
DMC Telecom (AS268551) — regional Brazilian ISP based in Sao Paulo, serving residential and business customers across the Greater Sao Paulo metro area.

Open peering at IX.br SP (PTT-SP): 40G via Telium + 10G via Equinix SP2 virtual. Bilateral and via Route Servers.

Capabilities: IPv4/IPv6 unicast | RPKI ROV (invalids dropped) | IRR AS268551:AS-CONE current | MD5 / GTSM (TTL=255) / BFD on request.

Suggested max-prefix: 100 v4 / 50 v6 (negotiable). Minimum prefix length accepted: /24 IPv4, /48 IPv6.

Peering requests: ticket@peering.dmctelecom.com.br
BGP technical: bgp@noc.dmctelecom.com.br
NOC 24/7: ticket@noc.dmctelecom.com.br | +55 11 3280-3919

Looking Glass: https://lg.dmctelecom.com.br
Peering portal: https://peering.dmctelecom.com.br
